scripts.electron:dev: ELECTRON_BUILD=1 pnpm --filter frontend run build && pnpm run rebuild:electron && electron .
scripts.electron:build: ELECTRON_BUILD=1 pnpm --filter frontend run build && pnpm run rebuild:electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js && pnpm run dmg:create
scripts.dmg:create: bash -c 'DMG_TMP=$(mktemp -d) && cp -R release/mac-arm64/员工管理系统.app "$DMG_TMP/" && ln -s /Applications "$DMG_TMP/Applications" && hdiutil create -volname 员工管理系统 -srcfolder "$DMG_TMP" -ov -format UDZO release/员工管理系统-$(node -p "require(\"./package.json\").version")-arm64.dmg && rm -rf "$DMG_TMP"'
